text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
McQueen was telling me that she wishes to visit
the new makeup store on our next day off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She made it sound like you and I would be joining
her, but... Did you know about this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What? No, that's news to me. A makeup store,
huh... Those places are awfully... girly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you and McQueen will find products that
suit you, but... I don't think makeup suits me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hold on. What are you talking about,
Dober? You're adorable! You'd look great with
makeup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I mean... I don't personally think I'm ready for
makeup... But I'd still like to take a look.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'd feel a lot more comfortable with you there...
But if you don't want to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A-all right. But you better not try to get out of
this little shopping trip later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I won't! And don't worry... We've got this!
